creator: floyd@pflog.net
text:
The zsh port currently uses the obsolete NOSHARED make variable. It should be
updated to use NO_SHARED instead.

Fix: 

sed -i -e 's/NOSHARED/NO_SHARED/g' /usr/ports/shells/zsh/Makefile
How-To-Repeat: 	
	cd /usr/ports/shells/zsh
	make -DNOSHARED

results in:

	"/usr/share/mk/bsd.compat.mk", line 36: warning: NOSHARED is deprecated in favor of NO_SHARED
